name: Articrafty
short_description: What will you create? Combine realism and fantasy. Combine characteristics with abilities. Create unique items. Achieve "Legendary" mastery. Breathe life.
detailed_description:
"Articrafty" is a game about creating artifacts. What will you create? Combine realism and fantasy. Combine characteristics with abilities. Create unique items. Achieve "Legendary" mastery.

  • Create unique things.

  • Start with ordinary items at hand. End with a great master who has created "Legendary" artifacts.

  • With the help of magic, breathe life into your artifacts. They will be faithful assistants.

  • Test your artifacts on enemies. Enemies can improve themselves with items, raising their level. Turn into bosses.
